summary: Iteration 64: Full testing of Product Scraping API endpoints. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Verified real product scraping from Videnov.bg returns actual product names, EUR prices, and valid URLs with scraped=true. Frontend AI Designer page correctly implements verified badges ('Реален') and button text ('Купи от' vs 'Търси в').
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (20/20 Passed) ===
✅ GET /api/products/stores - returns 200 with 9+ Bulgarian stores
✅ Videnov store has scraping=True (Playwright-based scraper)
✅ All stores have id, name, url, scraping fields
✅ GET /api/products/search?q=диван&stores=videnov&limit=3 - returns 3 real scraped products
✅ Scraped products have scraped=true, search_link=false, valid videnov.bg URLs
✅ Search returns product names: 'Разтегателен ъглов диван Балино' (750€), 'Разтегателен ъглов диван Джъстин' (489€)
✅ Non-scraped stores (praktiker) return search_link=true with correct search URLs
✅ GET /api/products/for-room/bathroom returns categorized products
✅ Response has room_type, budget_eur, categories, products_by_category, real_products count
✅ GET /api/products/categories/bathroom returns category list with query/stores details
✅ All room types (bathroom, kitchen, living_room, bedroom, corridor, balcony) have categories
=== FRONTEND CODE VERIFICATION ===
✅ AIDesignerPage.jsx line 687: Verified badge shows 'Реален' for verified=true products
✅ AIDesignerPage.jsx line 709: Button shows 'Купи от {store}' for verified, 'Търси в {store}' for search links
✅ AIDesignerPage.jsx line 511: Progress shows 'Търсене на реални продукти от магазини...' during generation
✅ AIDesignerPage.jsx line 664: Badge count shows '{n} реални продукта' per tier
=== BACKEND INTEGRATION ===
✅ server.py line 2952: AI Designer imports and calls get_products_for_room() from scraper
✅ server.py line 3084: Sets verified=true for real products with valid URLs
✅ server.py line 3097: Sets verified=false for search link fallbacks
✅ server.py line 3083: Applies affiliate tracking to product URLs
critical_code_review_comments: 1. ✅ Playwright-based scraper for Videnov.bg with proper browser singleton pattern
2. ✅ Fallback to search URLs for non-scraped stores (Praktiker, etc.)
3. ✅ 24-hour MongoDB caching with TTL for scraped products
4. ✅ Proper price parsing for EUR/BGN formats
6. ✅ Affiliate URL generation with store-specific params (utm_source, ref)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Code verified, page requires auth for full testing)

test_credentials: No auth required for product API endpoints (public)
seed_data_creation: None - Uses live scraping from Videnov.bg
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 fully tested the new product scraping feature. All /api/products/* endpoints work correctly. Videnov.bg scraping returns real product data (names, prices, URLs). The AI Designer page requires authentication to test the full flow with image upload and 3D generation. The verified badge logic and button text in AIDesignerPage.jsx are correctly implemented based on the verified field from scraped products.
